---
name: Bug report
about: Report a defect in mcify
title: "[bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Reproduction

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Run `...`
2. Open `...`
3. See error `...`

A minimal repro repo or gist is hugely appreciated.

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, screenshots.

## Environment

- mcify version: (e.g. `@mcify/cli@0.1.0`)
- Node version: (`node --version`)
- Bun version: (`bun --version`, if used)
- pnpm version: (`pnpm --version`)
- OS: (e.g. macOS 14.5, Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04)
- MCP client: (e.g. Claude Desktop 0.7.x, Cursor, custom)

## Additional context

Anything else relevant: related issues, recent changes, workarounds you tried.
